name: Atomic Commits
description: Each commit should represent one logical change. Large PRs mixing unrelated changes are hard to review and revert.
auto_fix_hint: Split the PR into focused, smaller PRs per feature/fix

examples.good:
// PR: "feat: add payment amount validation"
// Touches only PaymentViewModel and PaymentValidatorTests

name: No Binary Files in Diff
description: Large binary files (images, compiled archives) should not be tracked in Git. Use asset catalogs or a CDN.
auto_fix_hint: Add to .gitignore, use Git LFS for large assets, or use asset catalogs properly

examples.good: // Binary assets in .gitignore or Git LFS

name: No Merge Commits on Feature Branches
description: Feature branches should rebase on main, not merge. Merge commits create messy history.
auto_fix_hint: Use git rebase origin/main instead of git merge main
